expectations.text: Uses semantic resolution (not grep for 'class.*Konstrained') to find implementations
expectations.evidence: Transcript major steps show `kast_resolve`, `kast_scaffold`, and `kast_workspace_files`; grep is not mentioned.

expectations.text: Lists all sealed subtypes with their file paths
expectations.evidence: The answer enumerates every subtype declared in `Konstrained.kt` (Primitive, its four nested primitive interfaces, Object, Array, Encoder, Decoder, AsString, AsInt, AsBoolean, AsDouble) and gives the `Konstrained.kt` path/line plus the external `TestFixtures.kt:47` implementation.

expectations.text: Correctly identifies which module each implementation lives in
expectations.evidence: The source-declared subtypes are mapped to `konditional.konditional-types.main`, and the external `RetryPolicy` implementation is mapped to `konditional.konditional-engine.testFixtures`, which matches the workspace module/source-root layout.

expectations.text: Does not miss implementations in other modules
expectations.evidence: The run surfaced the cross-module `RetryPolicy` implementation in `konditional-engine/src/testFixtures/.../TestFixtures.kt:47`, and grading-time search found that same external implementation.

claims.claim: All direct Konstrained subtypes are declared in Konstrained.kt.
claims.evidence: `Konstrained.kt` contains the direct nested subtypes `Primitive`, `Object`, `Array`, `Encoder`, `Decoder`, `AsString`, `AsInt`, `AsBoolean`, and `AsDouble`.

claims.claim: RetryPolicy is a concrete external Konstrained implementation in testFixtures.
claims.evidence: `TestFixtures.kt` contains `data class RetryPolicy(...) : Konstrained.Object` at line 47.
